topics.title: Radio Show Scheduling and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the logistics of morning radio programming before transitioning into a series of jokes and commentary regarding celebrity relationships, Jewish identity, and historical figures.

topics.title: Radio Show Comedy Bits and Music
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the inclusion of a repetitive comedy bit in rotation, followed by the airing of a provocative music video and a segment featuring a prank call.

topics.title: Impressionist Comedy and Public Service Announcements
topics.summary: The studio explores the comedic persona of "Evil Dave," featuring a series of absurd public service announcements and a game testing his ability to pronounce complex celebrity names.

topics.title: Negotiations and Caller Interactions
topics.summary: The studio explores a high-priced contract negotiation for Riley Martin, discusses medical procedures and plastic surgery risks, and engages in a heated exchange with a caller before taking a call from a dedicated listener.

topics.title: Domain Name Disputes and Health Concerns
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on the WIPO resolution process for reclaiming domain names, an update on local news including a reporter's legal scare, and a segment regarding personal health issues and dietary changes.

topics.title: Connecticut Senate Primary and Media Criticism
topics.summary: The studio discusses a primary challenge against Senator Lieberman in Connecticut, his stance on the Iraq War, and critiques of television standards following recent broadcasts.

topics.title: Political Commentary and Media News
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including the Connecticut Republican primary, internal staff dynamics, celebrity health rumors, and the firing of a PBS host over an inappropriate video.

topics.title: Wendy Williams Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation with Wendy Williams regarding her career in radio, her marriage and experiences with infidelity, and her personal life.

topics.title: Wendy Williams and Howard Stern Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation between Howard Stern and Wendy Williams regarding her personal life, career milestones, and past relationships.

topics.title: Radio Career and Business Ventures
topics.summary: The studio explores the guest's transition from radio to various business ventures, including a champagne brand, a modeling agency, and her experiences with industry contracts.

topics.title: Radio Show Segment
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding celebrity rumors, the challenges of radio production, and a review of various musical submissions received from listeners.

topics.title: Negotiations Over Comedy Bit Rights
topics.summary: The studio negotiates a contract with a roofing contractor who created the "Come Paste" comedy bit, leading to a bidding war over the rights to his work.

topics.title: Comedy CD Review and Negotiation
topics.summary: The studio evaluates several tracks from a comedy CD, including "Come Paste" and "Spermaholic," while debating the quality of the material before transitioning to a negotiation with Riley Martin.

topics.title: Contract Negotiations and Reporter Incident
topics.summary: The studio features a tense negotiation over contract terms and salary with a performer named Riley, followed by a news segment regarding reporter Penny Crone's near-arrest in Maine.

topics.title: Media News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including a report on an actress's behavior, celebrity interview reactions, upcoming comic book movies, medical advancements in contraception, and legal issues involving a reality TV star.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including celebrity gossip regarding Naomi Campbell and Madonna, international news involving Condoleezza Rice and the conflict in Lebanon, domestic legal updates on Andrea Yates and Mafia cops, and various segments on pop culture and local events.
